title: 2025 16 Inch FHD Laptop 12th Gen N95 Quad-Core (Processor Up to 3.4GHz) - 16GB DDR4 RAM 512GB M.2 SSD, Support Dual-Band WiFi, HDMI, USB 3.2, BT 5.2, 1200 16:10HD Display, 5000mAh Long-Battery
features: 【Unleash Next-Level Performance with 12th Gen Processor】Experience a major speed boost with the TIVIQUE LX16 Laptop. Powered by the latest 12th Gen Alder Lake N95 processor (4 Cores, up to 3.4GHz), it performs over 30% faster than the previous N5095 generation. Handle daily tasks effortlessly, while the integrated UHD Graphics (up to 1200MHz) delivers smooth visuals for work, streaming, and light entertainment.

【Vibrant 16-inch 16:10 FHD IPS Display】Dive into stunning clarity on the 16-inch Full HD 1920*1200 IPS display. With ultra-narrow bezels and 100% sRGB colour gamut, everything from documents to movies looks vibrant and true-to-life. The dedicated eye-care mode reduces blue light, helping you stay comfortable during long work or study sessions.

【Smooth Multitasking & Ample Storage】Effortlessly run multiple apps at once with 16GB of DDR4 RAM. The 512GB SSD ensures quick boot-ups, fast app loading, and plenty of space for your files and media—ideal for everyday office and student use.

【Comprehensive Connectivity for Your Workspace】Stay connected with a versatile range of ports: USB Type-C (data), three USB 3.0 ports, HDMI, an SD card reader, and an audio jack. With Wi-Fi 5 and Bluetooth 5.0, enjoy stable wireless connections wherever you are.

【Lightweight, Portable & Built for Comfort】Designed for life on the go, the LX16 is just 1.56kg and 18.9mm thin—sliding easily into your bag for commuting or travel. The large ergonomic keyboard and spacious touchpad offer comfortable typing, while the intelligent cooling system runs quietly. A 5000mAh battery keeps you powered all day.

【Enhanced Video Calls with Privacy Assurance】Look and sound your best on 720p HD video calls, with autofocus and background blur for a professional look. Your privacy is protected with a physical camera switch. Dual stereo speakers make sure you’re heard clearly in meetings or while enjoying music.
